tasks.label: Start RoleRocket Server
tasks.command: $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($conn) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 900; Write-Host 'Killed old process on port 5000' }; Set-Location "${workspaceFolder}"; node server.js
